lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think of Ali Morrisane?

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: I don't trust him, not after he's sent his men round to threaten us.

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: Did you know, we've had four different thugs come round and threaten us if we don't join them.

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: The owner's had hammers, rakes, swords and even scissors waved at him!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What will you do about it?

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: We'll carry on as normal with the store. Business as usual!

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: Can I interest you in anything?
